description: Behind-the-scenes content that reveals the origin story, cultivation process, and human narratives behind food and beverage products, connecting consumers to the land and farmers.
structural_recipe: Showcase the journey from farm to cup/table: feature crop cultivation, farmer interviews, land narratives, and production processes. Use Arabic storytelling to humanize the supply chain. Layer multiple perspectives—agricultural heritage, environmental connection, artisan craftsmanship. Caption in Arabic emphasizing authenticity and deeper connection beyond the final product.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value transparency and heritage narratives. Behind-the-scenes content builds trust by revealing authenticity and craftsmanship. Connecting products to land and people aligns with Islamic values of stewardship and respect for natural resources, creating emotional investment beyond commodity consumption.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure farmer/producer consent and dignified representation to avoid exploitation narratives
Verify agricultural claims align with local/regional farming practices to maintain credibility
Avoid romanticizing labor conditions; focus on skill and heritage rather than hardship
Labor imagery must comply with Saudi employment standards and cultural sensitivities
cultural_constraints: Respect Islamic values regarding land stewardship and gratitude for natural resources
Ensure modest representation of any human subjects in imagery
Use classical Arabic or Modern Standard Arabic in captions for elevated perception
Avoid any content conflicting with Saudi environmental or agricultural regulations
